title: Epiphany CultMesh Operator Status
description: Native operator-status document naming the Codex bridge role, Epiphany authority role, prompt boundary, and quarantined optional bridge surfaces.

codexBridgeRole.description: What Codex may do for this Epiphany instance: bridge OpenAI/model transport, streaming, and Codex-native app-server affordances.

epiphanyAuthorityRole.description: What Epiphany owns: state, processes, prompts, scheduler decisions, organ contracts, and mutation law.

promptAuthority.description: Boundary forbidding Codex prompt machinery from injecting doctrine, role instructions, state law, or coordinator policy into Epiphany agents.
